meaning: In January only, at midnight, on either the 1st day of the month OR on any Monday. (Month AND midnight apply to BOTH the date and the weekday condition.)

tammikuussa joko 1. päivänä tai maanantaisin keskiyöllä
keskiyöllä tammikuussa joko 1. päivänä tai maanantaisin

meaning: In the months June through September only, at midnight, on either the 1st day of the month OR on any Friday. (Month range AND midnight apply to both conditions.)

kesäkuusta syyskuuhun joko 1. päivänä tai perjantaisin keskiyöllä

meaning: In the months June through August only, at midnight, on either the LAST day of the month OR on any Monday. (Month range AND midnight apply to both conditions.)

kesäkuusta elokuuhun joko kuukauden viimeisenä päivänä tai maanantaisin keskiyöllä

meaning: In January and July only, at 0:05, 5:05, 10:05, 15:05 and 20:05, on either the 1st day of the month OR on any Monday. (The two months AND the listed times apply to both the date and the weekday condition.)

meaning: In June only, at 0, 5, 10, 15 and 20 o'clock, at the 0 and 45 minute marks, on either days 1-5 of the month OR on weekdays Monday through Friday. (June and the times apply to both day conditions.)

meaning: At the 5, 10 and 30 minute marks, during the hours 9 through 20 inclusive AND also at 22 o'clock (22 is a separate discrete hour, NOT a range endpoint — hour 21 is excluded).
